title: Beach trooper

'''Beach Troopers''' were a specialized branch of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who wore a stripped down variant of the usual [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], which included the regular [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] and a [[Bathing togs|swimsuit]]. Beach troopers were often found lounging in baths and spas, seemingly off-duty. If an intruder or enemy were to come upon them, however, they would jump into action and engage the opposition. Among the locales in which they were stationed were aboard the [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']], aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] near [[Detention Block AA-23]], and [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] during the [[Occupation of Bespin]].<ref name="LSW2">''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]''</ref>

Beach Troopers wore a standard-issue stormtrooper helmet and a speedo<ref name="LSW2" /> or a full bathing suit,<ref name="TCS">''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]''</ref> as well as being armed with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Ascension gun/Legends|ascension gun]].<ref name="Prima">[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy: Prima Official Game Guide|''LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Beach troopers were created only for the games in which they are featured and are intended as a simple joke rather than a [[canon]]ical class of stormtroopers.<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|148|Imperial Icons}}</ref>
